issues.sample: Note:  even though this is a Toyota vehicle, it has a Subaru Boxer 4 engine.   This issue has happened twice this year, once at a stoplight back on May 20 and again Oct. 16 while in line at a Chic Filet.  In both cases pressing the brake harder helped keep me from moving forward.

narrative.headline: What 2020 Toyota 86 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).
